title: SharePoint node returns Error code 400 on filter
symptom: When applying a filter using 'Filter by formula' in the SharePoint node, an Error code 400 is returned, indicating a bad request.
not_this_if: No error occurs when filtering without a formula
root_cause: The error occurs because the 'FileLeafRef' field is not indexed in SharePoint, which leads to performance issues when querying large lists. SharePoint restricts non-indexed queries to prevent slow performance.
fix_steps: Go to SharePoint Dashboard and navigate to Settings.
Select Columns and add 'FileLeafRef' as an indexed column.
Alternatively, use an HTTP Request node with the header 'Prefer' set to 'HonorNonIndexedQueriesWarningMayFailRandomly'.
agent_instruction: Add 'FileLeafRef' as an indexed column in SharePoint to resolve the error.
